creator: cejkar@fit.vutbr.cz
text:
Please fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.cz/pub/FreeBSD-local/tnftpd.tar.gz
 (MD5: eb4f0e4eebac3ced2d8f112d256bef59), where is updated ftp/tnftpd
 port from 20040810_1 to 20061204. Two files have been removed (pkg-plist
 and files/patch-libnetbsd-glob.c), others are updated.
 
 Thanks.
